Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3302-10-14
Freelance Report The Cassiopeia Expedition
The Earth Expeditionary Fleet announced a bold expedition beyond the Perseus Arm to locate Cassiopeia A and Tycho's Star, two supernova remnants in the Cassiopeia constellation, passing through the Formidine Rift.
3302-09-23
Galactic News Chairman of MetaDrive Inc. Passes Away
Femi Dakarai, chairman of hyperdrive-research company MetaDrive Inc., has passed away in the Chi Orionis system following a short illness attributed to overwork. Junior employee Raan Corsen has been suspended after auditors detected account irregularities and is being sought by security forces.
3302-09-09
Galactic News We Have a Winner!
Commander Falchion of the Chi Orionis system has won the Melee Masters arena competition, using a ruse in the final bout to draw their opponent into firing range.
3302-08-27
Galactic News Problems at MetaDrive
Independent auditor BigSix reported financial anomalies leading to MetaDrive Inc. being placed in receivership. Sirius Corp unexpectedly volunteered to support the struggling hyperdrive research company, revealing prior licensing talks.
3302-08-12
Galactic News Economic Turmoil Ahead
The Galactic Finance Times reported evidence of a significant economic downturn among major corporations including Sirius, Gutamaya, and Core Dynamics, with resources being diverted to research and development. MetaDrive Inc., a hyperdrive research start-up in the Chi Orionis system, is reportedly seeking investment amid the uncertainty.
